MARISAMOD-MINI_HAKKERO.title: Mini Hakkero
MARISAMOD-MINI_HAKKERO.description: When you play a card while your [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] is less than [blue]8[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Charge-Up[/gold].
MARISAMOD-MINI_HAKKERO.flavor: A mini-Eight Trigram Furnace, a gift from Rinnosuke when Marisa left her parents.
MARISAMOD-BEWITCHED_HAKKERO.title: Bewitched Hakkero
MARISAMOD-BEWITCHED_HAKKERO.description: When you play a card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Charge-Up[/gold]. When you play an Attack card, gain [blue]1[/blue] more [gold]Charge-Up[/gold].
MARISAMOD-BEWITCHED_HAKKERO.flavor: Its firepower is on a new level, but is it OK to use a bewitched tool?
MARISAMOD-AMPLIFY_WAND.title: Amplify Wand
MARISAMOD-AMPLIFY_WAND.flavor: A Wand that seems to not be used often.
MARISAMOD-EXPERIMENTAL_FAMILIAR.title: Experimental Familiar
MARISAMOD-EXPERIMENTAL_FAMILIAR.descript: At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Spark[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_BROOM.title: Magic Broom
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_BROOM.description: Every third time you play a 0-cost card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_BROOM.flavor: Marisa always travels on her flying broom.
MARISAMOD-HANDMADE_GRIMOIRE.title: Homemade Grimoire
MARISAMOD-HANDMADE_GRIMOIRE.description: At the start of each battle, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw a card for every [blue]15[/blue] cards in your deck.
MARISAMOD-HANDMADE_GRIMOIRE.flavor: Actually a notebook full of experiment records and magic material recipes; just how Marisa develops her Magics.
MARISAMOD-SHROOM_BAG.title: Shroom Bag
MARISAMOD-SHROOM_BAG.description:
Add [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Spore Mind[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold] upon pick up.
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, draw a card and [gold]heal[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] Hp when you play a [gold]Spore Mind[/gold]
MARISAMOD-SHROOM_BAG.flavor: All witches have an abnormal enthusiasm for mushrooms... Or is it just Marisa...?
MARISAMOD-BIG_SHROOM_BAG.title: Big Shroom Bag
MARISAMOD-BIG_SHROOM_BAG.description:
Replace [gold]Shroom Bag[/gold].
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, draw [blue]2[/blue] cards and [gold]heal[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] Hp when you play a [gold]Spore Mind[/gold]
MARISAMOD-BIG_SHROOM_BAG.flavor: Now this bag is big enough.
MARISAMOD-SIMPLE_LAUNCHER.title: Simple Launcher
MARISAMOD-SIMPLE_LAUNCHER.description: Reduce your [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] trigger threshold from [blue]8[/blue] to [blue]6[/blue].
MARISAMOD-SIMPLE_LAUNCHER.flavor: A flashlight is a flashlight, no matter what it's called...
MARISAMOD-UNSTABLE_MAGIC_TOOL.title: Unstable Magic Tool
MARISAMOD-UNSTABLE_MAGIC_TOOL.descriptio: At the start of each battle, [gold]Enchant[/gold] up to [blue]3[/blue] cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] with [gold]Starlit[/gold] for the rest of combat.
MARISAMOD-BREAD_OF_A_WASHOKU_LOVER.title: Bread of a Washoku Lover
MARISAMOD-BREAD_OF_A_WASHOKU_LOVER.descr:
Heal [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Hp[/gold] when you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [gold]Curse[/gold] or [gold]Status[/gold].
When triggered 13 times, you gain [blue]13[/blue] max Hp,and this relic no longer works.
MARISAMOD-BREAD_OF_A_WASHOKU_LOVER.flavo:
"Can you remember how many slices of bread you have eaten until now?"
"Thirteen. I prefer Japanese food."
SEA_GLASS.MARISA_CHARACTER.title: Starlit Glass
